name: siftkit
description: Windows-first shell-output compression toolkit for Codex workflows.

scripts.start:status: powershell -NoLogo -NoProfile -Command "$env:sift_kit_status = Join-Path (Get-Location) '.siftkit\status\inference.txt'; $env:SIFTKIT_STATUS_PATH = $env:sift_kit_status; $env:SIFTKIT_CONFIG_PATH = Join-Path (Get-Location) '.siftkit\config.json'; nodemon --signal SIGINT --watch .\dist\status-server --ext js,json .\dist\status-server\index.js"
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build && npx c8 --include="dist/**/*.js" --exclude="dist/src/**" --exclude="node_modules/**" --reporter=text --reporter=text-summary npx tsx --test .\tests\runtime-loadconfig.test.ts .\tests\runtime-summarize.test.ts .\tests\runtime-planner-token-aware.test.ts .\tests\runtime-planner-mode.test.ts .\tests\runtime-provider-llama.test.ts .\tests\runtime-status-server.test.ts .\tests\runtime-execution-lease.test.ts .\tests\runtime-metrics-aggregation.test.ts .\tests\runtime-cli.test.ts .\tests\runtime-benchmark.test.ts .\tests\cli-help.test.ts .\tests\cli-command-surface.test.ts .\tests\repo-search-cli.test.ts .\tests\status-server-shutdown.test.ts .\tests\mock-repo-search-loop.test.ts .\tests\repo-search-status-server.test.ts .\tests\dashboard-status-server.test.ts .\tests\find-files.test.ts .\tests\command.test.ts .\tests\cli-internal.test.ts .\tests\execution-lock.test.ts .\tests\repo-search.test.ts .\tests\eval.test.ts .\tests\install.test.ts .\tests\interactive.test.ts .\tests\config.test.ts .\tests\llama-cpp.test.ts .\tests\benchmark-matrix.test.ts
scripts.test:live: npm run build && powershell -Command "$env:SIFTKIT_TEST_USE_EXISTING_SERVER='1'; if (-not $env:SIFTKIT_STATUS_BACKEND_URL) { $env:SIFTKIT_STATUS_BACKEND_URL='http://127.0.0.1:4765/status' }; if (-not $env:SIFTKIT_CONFIG_SERVICE_URL) { $env:SIFTKIT_CONFIG_SERVICE_URL='http://127.0.0.1:4765/config' }; npx tsx --test --test-name-pattern 'concurrent oversized CLI summary requests' .\tests\runtime-cli.test.ts"
